zh.lifeSummary: 當Knud Magnussen於大約1129年出生在丹麥奧本哈福奧姆洛斯吉爾德 多姆恩洛斯吉爾德時，他的父親Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden25歲，母親Richenza von Polen14歲。他和Princess Helen of Sweden至少有3個兒子和8個女兒。他於1146年在丹麥被列為king。他去世於1157年8月9日在他的家鄉享年29歲。

nameMeanings.name: Magnussen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Alf, Bjorn, Helle, Oivind.
Danish, Norwegian, and North German: patronymic from the personal name   Magnus  .

variants.name: Magnus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Bernd, Egon, Erwin, Kurt, Otto, Reinhard, Volker, Wilhelm, Wolfgang.

German, Flemish, and Walloon: from the personal name Magnus, which is from the Latin adjective magnus ‘great’ or a Latinized form of a short form of ancient Germanic compound names based on the element magan ‘strength, might’. The name was borne by several early Christian saints, including St. Magnus (8th century), a monk in St. Gallen in Switzerland and missionary in Allgäu in southern Germany, whose real name was Magnoald. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). In Belgium, it may also be a Latinized (humanistic) form of Walloon Legrand .

English, Scottish, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, and North German: from the Scandinavian personal name Magnus, borne by Magnus the Good (died 1047), king of Norway and Denmark, who was named for the Emperor Charlemagne, Latin Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’, under the impression that Magnus was a personal name. The name spread from Norway to the eastern Scandinavian royal houses, and became popular all over Scandinavia and thence in the English Danelaw. It has also been adopted as a Jewish name.

variants.name: Magnusen
meanings: Americanized form (and a very rare Danish and Norwegian variant) of Danish and Norwegian   Magnussen  .

nameMeanings.name: Knud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Knud Magnussen was born about 1129, in Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Denmark, his father, Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden, was 25 and his mother, Richenza von Polen, was 14. He had at least 3 sons and 8 daughters with Princess Helen of Sweden. In 1146, at the age of 18, his occupation is listed as king in Denmark. He died on 9 August 1157, in his hometown, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Knud Magnussen est né environ 1129, à Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Danemark, son père, Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Richenza von Polen, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles avec Princess Helen of Sweden. En 1146, à l’âge de 18 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est king à Danemark. Il est décédé le 9 août 1157, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Knud Magnussen um 1129 in Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden 25 und seine Mutter Richenza von Polen 14. Er hatte mit Princess Helen of Sweden mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1146, als er 18 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als king in Dänemark aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. August 1157 im Alter von 29 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Knud Magnussen è nato il circa 1129 nel Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Danimarca, il suo padre, Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Richenza von Polen, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie con Princess Helen of Sweden. Nel 1146, all'età di 18 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come king nel Danimarca. Morì il 9 agosto 1157, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Knud Magnussenが約1129年にデンマーククoベンハヴンスoンメロスキルド ドムソグンロスキルドで生まれた時，父Magnus I den Stærke of Swedenは25歳，母Richenza von Polenは14歳であった。彼はPrincess Helen of Swedenとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘をもうけた。1146年，18歳の時，デンマークでの職業はkingと記録されている。彼は1157年8月9日に故郷で29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Knud Magnussen(이)가 대략 1129년 덴마크 ko벤하브 스o 로스킬드 돔소그 로스킬드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Richenza von Polen(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Princess Helen of Sweden(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1146년, 18세의 나이로 그의 직업은 덴마크에서 king이었다. 그는 1157년 8월 9일 그의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Knud Magnussen nasceu aproximadamente 1129, em Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dinamarca, seu pai, Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Richenza von Polen, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas com Princess Helen of Sweden. Em 1146, com 18 anos, sua profissão aparece como king em Dinamarca. Ele faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1157, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Knud Magnussen родился около 1129 г. в местности роскаилд, роскаилд домсогн, сoмм, кoбенавн, Дания, его отцу по имени Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Richenza von Polen, 14. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей от Princess Helen of Sweden. В 1146 году, в возрасте 18 лет,  он работал по профессии king в местности Дания. Он умер 9 августа 1157 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Knud Magnussen nació aproximadamente 1129, en Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dinamarca, su papá, Magnus I den Stærke of Sweden, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Richenza von Polen, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas con Princess Helen of Sweden. En 1146, a la edad de 18 años, su ocupación registrada era king en Dinamarca. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1157, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años.
